drink.title:
Just the
Good Stuff.
drink.description: We carry a carefully curated and rotating selection of craft beer with fourteen lines on draught and over 200 in cans and bottles. Crack one open here or haul it home. Your call.
drink.feature_1: 14 rotating draught lines — always something new
drink.feature_2: Around 200 cans and bottles from the UK and beyond
drink.feature_3: Always a good selection of alcohol-free and gluten-free beers
drink.feature_4: A small, well-formed selection of wine and spirits
drink.feature_5: Take away available from the bottle shop

food.title:
Smashed.
Gone in Minutes.
food.description: Burgers, wings, chips. That's the focus. The menu's small but tight — dry-aged beef, fried chicken sandwiches, proper chips hand cut and cooked twice. A few things for sharing. A few for soaking up the next beer. Vegan options that hold their own.

book.title: Bookings
book.description: Booking is optional — we always hold half the space for walk-ins. But if you want to guarantee a spot, book below.
book.groups_text: Call us on +44 7400 653295. We can't assure multiple booked tables will be next to each other — contact us and we'll sort it.
book.notice_text: Tables are reserved for 10 minutes — give us a call if you're running late. Garden seating is first-come, first-served and cannot be reserved.

location.title: Location & Hours
location.kitchen_note: Walk-in only after the kitchen closes.

footer.tagline: Craft Beer & Burgers in Edinburgh's Old Town since 2016.

gift_cards.page_title: Give the Gift of Craft Beer
gift_cards.subtitle: Pick a value, tell us who it's for, and we'll send a branded gift card by email with a PDF they can print.
gift_cards.expires_note: Gift cards are valid for 12 months from purchase.

gift_cards_success.title: Thank You!
gift_cards_success.subtitle: Your gift card has been created.
gift_cards_success.email_note: Check your email for a branded gift card with PDF attachment.
gift_cards_success.processing_text: Your payment is being confirmed. You'll receive an email with your gift card shortly.
